mapper.select: SELECT ea.*, u.real_name AS reviewer_name FROM entry_application ea LEFT JOIN user u ON ea.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE ea.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO entry_application ( applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_student_id, applicant_phone, team_name, team_type, team_description, innovation_direction, team_positioning, team_size, recruitment_requirements, instructor_name, instructor_contact, campus_mentor_name, campus_mentor_contact, enterprise_mentor_name, enterprise_mentor_contact, partner_company, project_name, project_description, project_achievements, expected_outcomes, is_competition_registered, competition_name, team_members, contact_phone, contact_email, attachments, status, approval_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantStudentId}, #{applicantPhone}, #{teamName}, #{teamType}, #{teamDescription}, #{innovationDirection}, #{teamPositioning}, #{teamSize}, #{recruitmentRequirements}, #{instructorName}, #{instructorContact}, #{campusMentorName}, #{campusMentorContact}, #{enterpriseMentorName}, #{enterpriseMentorContact}, #{partnerCompany}, #{projectName}, #{projectDescription}, #{projectAchievements}, #{expectedOutcomes}, #{isCompetitionRegistered}, #{competitionName}, #{teamMembers}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{attachments}, #{status}, #{approvalStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
